title: metric: Dist Execute Framework appear negative number
description: ## Bug Report Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks! ### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required) ```sql CREATE TABLE `sbtest1` ( `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `k` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `c` char(120) COLLATE latin1_bin NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `pad` char(60) COLLATE latin1_bin NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `k_1` (`k`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=10000001 DEFAULT CHARSET=latin1 COLLATE=latin1_bin; SET GLOBAL tidb_enable_dist_task = ON; import into sbtest1 from 's3://xxxx' WITH skip_rows=1; ``` ### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required) metrics do not appear negative number. ### 3. What did you see instead (Required) ### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required) ```sql mysql> select tidb_version(); +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | tidb_version() | +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ | Release Version: v5.5.0-alpha-5745-g911334b6ef Edition: Community Git Commit Hash: 911334b6ef7f548da6ef8ef90fc429c4c4c272b6 Git Branch: master UTC Build Time: 2023-11-14 09:49:59 GoVersion: go1.21.0 Race Enabled: false Check Table Before Drop: false Store: tikv | +-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+ 1 row in set (0.04 sec) ```
poc: `c` char(120) COLLATE latin1_bin NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
`pad` char(60) COLLATE latin1_bin NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
import into sbtest1 from 's3://xxxx' WITH skip_rows=1;
key_bug_features: Importing data with dist task enabled causes negative metrics
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `sbtest2` ( `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `k` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0', `c` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `pad` text NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `unique_k` (`k`)) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=1 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `sbtest2` WHERE `k` IS NULL OR `c` IS NULL;
